description_a: Finds the maximum element of a list.
description_b: Finds the maximum element of a list.

code_a:
def reverse(head):
    prev = None
    while head:
        nxt = head.next
        head.next = prev
        prev = head
        head = nxt
    return prev
code_b:
def rev(node):
    if node is None or node.next is None:
        return node
    new_head = rev(node.next)
    node.next.next = node
    node.next = None
    return new_head
